annotations.annotation: Effective date:
Regulations .01—.17 adopted as an emergency provision effective July 21, 1987 (14:17 Md. R. 1863); emergency status extended at 15:4 Md. R. 469; emergency status expired April 30, 1988
Chapter recodified from COMAR 05.01.18 to COMAR 05.05.04
Regulations .01—.17 adopted effective May 30, 1988 (15:11 Md. R. 1329)
Chapter revised effective February 18, 1991 (18:3 Md. R. 302)
Regulation .03B amended effective February 1, 1993 (20:2 Md. R. 110)
Regulation .05A amended effective February 1, 1993 (20:2 Md. R. 110)
Regulation .06 amended effective January 2, 1994 (20:25 Md. R. 1943)
Regulation .06A amended effective February 1, 1993 (20:2 Md. R. 110)
Regulation .06B amended effective April 5, 1999 (26:7 Md. R. 538)
Regulation .08C amended effective January 2, 1994 (20:25 Md. R. 1943)
Regulation .09 amended as an emergency provision effective August 24, 1995 (22:19 Md. R. 1457); emergency status extended at 23:7 Md. R. 547
Regulation .09 amended effective August 26, 1996 (23:17 Md. R. 1249)
Regulation .09H amended effective February 1, 1993 (20:2 Md. R. 110)
Regulation .11H amended effective February 1, 1993 (20:2 Md. R. 110)
Regulation .13D amended effective February 1, 1993 (20:2 Md. R. 110)
Regulation .15 repealed and new Regulation .15 adopted effective November 9, 1992 (19:22 Md. R. 1987)
Chapter revised effective March 5, 2001 (28:4 Md. R. 417)
Regulation .06A amended effective January 21, 2002 (29:1 Md. R. 21)
Regulation .11B amended effective June 11, 2001 (28:11 Md. R. 1053)
Chapter repealed effective March 13, 2006 (33:5 Md. R. 518)
